integrity.title: Build integrity
integrity.browser: Build integrity is only reported in the desktop app.
integrity.status.official.detail: Produced by the official CI release pipeline. Updater verifies signed bundles.
integrity.status.dev.detail: Self-compiled or otherwise outside the official pipeline. Auto-update is disabled to avoid clobbering your local changes.
integrity.status.forked.detail: The embedded updater public key does not match the official one. The auto-update channel is therefore not the official ProjectMind channel.
integrity.foot.docs: Compare the updater-key prefix with the value documented in the release notes / docs/security/updater-keys.md.
